Alessandra
Colombo
    About
    New York
    Alessandra recently graduated from Columbia University's Graduate School of Architecture, Planning and Preservation (GSAPP) with an MS in Urban Planning, after completing her undergraduate degree in Urban Planning and Real Estate at UCL in London. Originally from Milan, she has experience in real estate development, spatial analysis and urban research across projects in Europe, the US and Latin America, including work with Hines and Oxford Properties. She works at the intersection of real estate development, mixed-use projects, spatial analysis and urban research.
